name: more-paper-workflow
description: Academic workflow plugin for research topic clarification, outline generation, literature search, batch PDF download, Zotero organization, paper writing, citation audit, scientific figures, and polishing.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-centered academic research and writing workflow
interface.longDescription: more-paper-workflow routes academic work across topic clarification, outline design, structured search, literature retrieval, PDF download, Zotero organization, evidence-grounded writing, scientific figures, citation audit, and conservative polishing.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan and execute an evidence-grounded academic paper workflow
